title: 4. Lens distortion
text:
Even a standard lens (50mm in full frame camera)
can make a distortion in a close-up face shot, so a lens
lager than 70mm is recommended. To reduce the bias
from  distortion,  you  should  keep  the  same  distance
between the camera and the patients every time.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
~ !
~
113
• Always ﬁxed
- Light source
- Distance and angle between the camera and patient
• Adjust before the shot
- Height of the camera (or the patient's nose) to make the angle
between the camera and patient the same.
- White balance / exposure as needed
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
